items.title: Restore visible Google workbook evidence
items.question: Can the in-app Browser show egroup.kevin@gmail.com, the workbook title, and a successful XLSX export without connector fallback?

items.title: Check work-rhythm peopleCount increase
items.question: Does the move from 72 to 73 people reflect a real new planning signal or a parsing/category shift?

items.title: Keep Codex source-mode notes current
items.question: Did any Codex changelog item change the evidence capture path for browser, approval, remote, or automation runs?

items.title: Extract one agent-safety checklist
items.question: Can Anthropic's jailbreak/safeguards framing become a short untrusted-content checklist for Kevin's browser/account automations?

items.title: Find FSC virtual-asset consumer explainer
items.question: Has FSC published a clear FAQ or explainer suitable for a consumer checklist on virtual-asset platform risk?

items.title: Design one manual challenge loop
items.question: Can one weekly challenge plus a non-monetary status signal test repeat participation before any gamification UI is built?
